content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于11月26日17:00(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年12月10日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、战斗
● 星辰篇造物「在夕光里」的触发条件调整为回合结束时若银钥能量足够释放钥令即可触发，和「银钥觉醒」的条件一致。
● 唤醒体「卡斯托尔」的状态「侵蚀」现在会说明承受触腕伤害和主动伤害时，均会移除等量「侵蚀」，实际效果不变。
 
二、相位对弈
● 命轮「蓝环毒素」：使用「狂气爆发」后对敌人施加的「降生仪式」从 20 层降低为 10 层。
 
三、本地化
● 英语语言中，唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」、唤醒体「皮克曼」的繁衍狂欢剧情已完成人工翻译。
● 英语语言中，唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」觉醒卡描述文字的排版有所调整，使其更容易被阅读。
● 英语语言中，唤醒体启灵界面的银钥充能等级、狂气回充等级文字尺寸有所调整，使其更容易被阅读。
● 英语语言中，界面文本、融灾禁区排行榜界面等文本的排版有所调整，使其整体更整齐。
 
四、问题修复
【战斗】
● 修复了星辰篇造物「异种喉舌」单回合内施加中毒能够超出造物描述上限的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「群星之酒」对部分非衍生指令卡无法触发额外生效效果的问题。
● 修复了命轮「待到雪山消融」在「冰雪」层数为 0 时，装备唤醒体未能获得暴击率加成的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「奥瑞塔」天赋「快乐精灵」增加的触腕伤害会在回合结束后错误移除的问题。
● 修复了敌人「福音执事」战斗时，我方打出附加「蹈海者咒怨」的卡牌击杀敌人时，会无法正确结束战斗的问题。
● 修复了敌人「乐园帷幕」的许多镜头动画效果有时会缺失的问题。
● 修复了「战斗」中界面顶部的特殊预警文本过多时超出文字展示范围的问题。
● 修复了「战斗」中使用「时序逆行」之后有时无法操作的问题。  
● 修复了「回放」时唤醒体头像和钥令资源可能会显示不正确的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」试玩中钥令「不平等交换」与「一声枪响」使用时会错误卡住的问题。
 
【剧情】
● 修复了唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」故事四解锁条件显示缺失的问题。
● 修复了调查行动「星辰篇-第四章」中凯刻斯武器描写错误的问题。
● 修复了调查行动「星辰篇-第四章」中法洛思一段台词重复出现的问题。
● 修复了调查行动「星辰篇-第四章」中法洛思一处名字错误称呼为法洛斯的问题。
● 修复了调查行动「星辰篇-第四章」通关后通讯器剧情选项文字丢失的问题。
● 修复了多维连接「逆转回合」关卡完成后黑屏的问题。
● 修复了「繁衍狂热」已解锁的内容有时候被错误锁住的问题。
 
【一般】
● 修复了限时活动中「重现」也能错误地增加「每周试炼」任务进度的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒」中个别情况下可能会导致当前唤醒活动意外切换到第一个唤醒活动的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒」中在「唤醒5次」的唤醒结果界面继续唤醒时，个别情况下可能会意外参与到其他唤醒活动的问题。如果守密人遇到过这样的情况，请联络客服进行进一步查证，我们会后续统一安排退还处理。
● 修复了「活动」界面进入时可能导致卡住的问题。
 
【显示】
● 修复了「唤醒体」状态栏存在异常红点的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒」中「渊缚孕形」右侧下方的推荐唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」头像下方显示为错误橙色的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒」中「崇尊诞仪」页签下方出现轻微白边的问题。
● 修复了「密契强化」中尚未解锁「材料置换」时错误地显示了「置换设置」的问题。
● 修复了「密契强化」中首次进行材料置换时会错误提示道具未找到的问题。
● 修复了活动「神诞的祭礼」中，商店抽到已获得命轮时、缺乏「特殊」文字角标的问题。
● 修复了「信箱」中已领取的邮件中，点击道具图标未能展示道具信息的问题。
 
【本地化】
● 修复了特定语言设置下，唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」狂气爆发造成伤害和伤害次数数字显示不正确的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下，「迎灾特训」任务所需的融灾禁区点数错误标注了两次的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下，「调查行动-星辰篇-第一章」、「调查行动-星辰篇-第三章」，唤醒体「索蕾尔」通讯器对话中存在的拼写错误问题。
● 修复了特定语言设置下，相位对弈结算界面的命轮名会异常超出文字框的问题。

**V2.4.0.6 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on November 26 at 17:00(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on December 10, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Battle
● The triggering condition for the Astral Reign Relic "In Twilight" is adjusted to activate if there is sufficient Keyflare to release the Posse at the end of the turn, consistent with the conditions for "Keyflare Rouse".
● The Awakener "Castor"'s State "Corrosion" now specifies that an equal amount of "Corrosion" will be removed when taking Tentacle DMG and Active DMG, while the actual effect remains unchanged.
 
2. Traphase
● Wheel of Destiny "Blue-Ringed Toxin": The "Birth Ritual" inflicted on enemies after using "Exalt" is reduced from 20 stacks to 10 stacks.
 
3. Localization
● In the English language, the Proliferate Frenzy story of the Awakeners "Murphy: Fauxborn" and "Pickman" has been completed with manual translation.
● In the English language, the layout of the awakening card description text for the Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn" has been adjusted for better readability.
● In the English language, the text size of the Keyflare Regen Level and Aliemus Regen Level in the Awakener Enlighten interface has been adjusted for better readability.
● In the English language, the layout of interface text, the D-Effect Zone leaderboard interface, and other texts has been adjusted for a more organized overall appearance.
 
4. Problem Fix
[Battle]
● Fixed the issue where the relic "Other Tongue" in Astral Reign could apply poison exceeding the relic description limit in a single turn.
● Fixed the issue where the relic "Stellar Brew" in Astral Reign could not trigger additional effect for certain non-derived Command Cards.
● Fixed the issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Til the Snow Melts" did not grant Crit. Rate bonuses to the equipped Awakener when the "Snow" stacks were at 0.
● Fixed the issue where the Tentacle DMG granted by the Awakener "Aurita"'s Talent "Happy Little Fairy" would incorrectly be removed after the end of the turn.
● Fixed the issue where the enemy "Oracle Steward" would not properly end the battle when our side played a card with the additional "Seafarer Curse" to kill the enemy.
● Fixed the issue where many camera animation effects of the enemy "Paradise Veil" would sometimes be missing.
● Fixed the issue where the special alert text at the top of the interface in "Battle" exceeded the text display area when there was too much text.
● Fixed the issue where sometimes operations could not be performed after using "Time Reversal" in "Battle"
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener's avatar and Posse resources might display incorrectly during "Playback."
● Fixed the issue where the Posse "Unequal Exchange" and "A Gun's Cry" would get stuck incorrectly during the trial of "Traphase."

[Story]
● Fixed the issue where the unlocking conditions for Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn" Story 4 were not displayed.
● Fixed the issue with the incorrect description of Caecus' weapon in "Investigation" Astral Reign - Chapter 4.
● Fixed the issue where a line of dialogue from Faros was repeated in the Investigation "Astral Reign - Chapter 4."
● Fixed the issue where "Faros" was incorrectly referred to as "Faros" in "Investigation - Astral Reign - Chapter 4".
● Fixed the issue of missing dialogue option text in the communicator after clearing "Investigation - Astral Reign - Chapter 4".
● Fixed the black screen issue after completing the "My Turn" stage in Multiverse Link.
● Fixed an issue where the content of "Reproduction Frenzy" that was unlocked sometimes got incorrectly locked.
 
[Normal]
● Fixed the issue in the limited-time event where "Reenact" could incorrectly increase the progress of the "Weekly Trial" task.
● Fixed the issue where, in certain cases during "Awaken," the current Awakening Event could unexpectedly switch to the first Awakening Event.
● Fixed an issue in "Awaken" where, in the "Awaken 5 times" results interface, continuing to awaken could unexpectedly involve other awakening events in certain cases. If Keepers have encountered this situation, please contact customer service for further verification, and we will arrange for a refund in due course.
● Fixed the issue that could cause freezing when entering the "Event" interface.
 
[Display]
● Fixed the issue where there was an abnormal red dot in the "Awakener" status bar.
● Fixed the issue where the recommended Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn" displayed an incorrect orange color below its avatar on the lower right side in "Awaken" under "Abyssbound Embryo".
● Fixed the issue where a slight white border appeared at the bottom of the "Venerated Birth" tab in the "Awaken" section.
● Fixed the issue where "Replacement Settings" was incorrectly displayed when "Material Conversion" was not yet unlocked in "Covenant Enhancement."
● Fixed the issue where an incorrect "Item not found" prompt would appear when performing material conversion for the first time in "Covenant Enhancement."
● Fixed the issue where the "special" text marker was missing when drawing an already obtained Wheel of Destiny in the event "Rites of Divine Birth."
● Fixed the issue where clicking the item icon in the received emails in the "Mail box" did not display item information.
 
[Localization]
● Fixed the issue where the damage and damage count numbers for the Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn" Exalt were displayed incorrectly under specific language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the D-Effect Zone points required for the "Preemptive Training" task were incorrectly marked twice under the English language setting.
● Fixed the spelling error in the dialogue of the Awakener "Sorel" communicator in "Investigation - Astral Reign - Chapter 1" and "Investigation - Astral Reign - Chapter 3" under English language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the Wheel of Destiny name would unusually exceed the text box in the Traphase settlement interface under specific language settings.

Dunno where to post but someone got this in the survey

1 star is saying highly recommend while 10 stars is for wouldnt recommend
make sure this isn't clogging your data
